# Repository Overview

This is the `https-github.com-stackblitz-core` repository. It is currently in the early stages of development.

## Repository Structure

The repository has a minimal structure:
- `README.md`: Project documentation
- `.github/`: GitHub configuration and workflow files

## Setup Instructions

1. Clone the repository:
   ```bash
   git clone https://github.com/rananisarsb51214-web/https-github.com-stackblitz-core.git
   ```

2. Navigate to the repository directory:
   ```bash
   cd https-github.com-stackblitz-core
   ```

## Build Instructions

Currently, there are no build steps required for this repository as it is in the initial setup phase.

## Testing Instructions

Currently, there are no tests configured for this repository.

## Coding Standards

When contributing to this repository:
- Write clear, readable code with meaningful variable and function names
- Add comments for complex logic to improve code maintainability
- Follow consistent formatting and naming conventions
- Ensure all commits have clear, descriptive messages
